attributes.description: Alerts when sustained average CPU utilization exceeds a threshold, indicating compute saturation and potential scheduling latency.
attributes.name: [AWS EC2 OTel] High CPU utilization

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-aws.ec2.otel-*
| WHERE Namespace == "AWS/EC2"
    AND MetricName == "CPUUtilization"
    AND stat == "Average"
| EVAL ec2_instance = CONCAT(InstanceId, " (", cloud.region, ")")
| STATS avg_cpu_pct = AVG(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`) BY ec2_instance
// Alert threshold (%): tune per workload — 90 is a common saturation starting point
| WHERE avg_cpu_pct > 90.0
| SORT avg_cpu_pct DESC
| LIMIT 100
